title: SimplyWalk
description: Let´s you walk half speed by pressing C with some cool animations
body:
Do you ever wondered why we need to run everywhere? Ever wanted to enjoy the view the right way? 

If yes then this mod is for you!

 

This mod let´s you walk with half the normal speed:

 ![walking](https://i.imgur.com/27b1ZOQ.gif)

Now you can glaze at those beautiful shaders god rays while you return from your farm. It is set to C by default, but you can change this in the movement section of key bindings in the configs.

It adds a neat little animation for the slow walking too. Highly recommended if you like the extra immersion and role play.

If you're carrying an axe or sword in your main hand it will trigger another animation:

![sword walk](https://i.imgur.com/bG7hebe.gif)

Combat mode:

If you want to walk slowly but still swing that weapon use combat mode (V), player will enter a 'fight' stance:



![combat mode](https://i.imgur.com/HeRMO8h.gif)

![fighting](https://i.imgur.com/fEDhqfJ.gif)
 

This mod with Better Third Person mod and some beautiful shaders:

 
![walking](https://i.imgur.com/HZCKEhX.gif)
 

You can set simply walk key to toggle or hold in the config files. 
This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
